Building on our extensive operational experience with data analytics, robotic process automation, and self-learning software tools, we are now integrating AI agents to drive greater process efficiency for customers while making operational roles more engaging and rewarding for employees by automating repetitive and time-consuming tasks such as manual data entry, routine scheduling, and standardized communications", Sally Miller, CIO DHL Supply Chain, explained.

title: DHL Scales Global Operations with Warehouse Automation
body: April 7, 2025 - For more than a decade, DHL Supply Chain has been modernizing their warehouse operations with AutoStore systems, seeking to enable swift scalability and standardized automation across their global markets. title: DHL Supply Chain accelerates automation deployments with SVT Robotics SOFTBOT® platform | AJOT.COM
body: March 17, 2026 - Prior to implementing the technology-neutral software, automation projects required separate custom coding for every new technology, taking up to six to eight weeks to initiate new solutions. This made enterprise-wide rollouts and upgrades slow and costly. Supported by the platform’s prebuilt SOFTBOT connectors, DHL is redoubling its move away from monolithic, all-in-one systems to modular warehouse setups that accommodate multiple automated solutions and can be reconfigured as technology and customer needs evolve.
